message:
test(recovery,scheduler): add recovery security integration test + scheduler repro artifact

- tests/recovery_security.rs: Integration test verifying that the
  RecoveryOrchestrator does not blindly trust the cs.verified flag from
  collectors when verify_integrity is enabled. Companion test for the
  recovery security fix in src/distributed/recovery.rs.

- tests/repro_local_task_leak.rs: Preserved artifact from an attempt to
  reproduce the local task routing bug via integration testing. The
  reproduction was moved to a unit test (test_local_task_cross_thread_
  wake_routes_correctly in three_lane.rs) due to API access limitations.
  Not a functional test (contains only fn main()).

Also includes 3 beads history snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+// This test file was an attempt to reproduce a local task leakage bug via integration testing.
+// However, due to API limitations (accessing RuntimeState from tasks) and environment issues
+// (SIGHUP on test execution), the reproduction was moved to a unit test in:
+// src/runtime/scheduler/three_lane.rs -> test_local_task_cross_thread_wake_routes_correctly
+//
+// This file is preserved as an artifact but is not a functional test.
+fn main() {}
